basics.name: Marcelo Santos Guimarães
basics.label: Associate Professor of Theoretical Physics
basics.summary: Associate Professor at UERJ working on non-perturbative quantum field theory, gauge-theory confinement, and quantum information in relativistic QFT.

work.name: Universidade do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (UERJ)
work.summary: Faculty member at the Department of Theoretical Physics, Institute of Physics.
highlights: Research in non-perturbative QFT and quantum information
Supervision of M.Sc. and Ph.D. students

highlights: Research on duality and non-perturbative aspects of gauge theories

publications.name: Publications in Physical Review D, JHEP, Nuclear Physics B, EPJ C, and SciPost Physics
publications.summary: Research output focused on non-perturbative QFT, confinement, and quantum-information observables in field theory.

interests.name: Research Interests
keywords: Bell-CHSH and Mermin inequalities in QFT

projects.name: Bell Inequalities in Quantum Field Theory
projects.summary: Development of Bell-based diagnostics in relativistic QFT using modular and algebraic methods.

projects.name: Confinement and Gribov-Zwanziger Program
projects.summary: Investigation of infrared gauge dynamics and confinement through BRST-consistent non-perturbative frameworks.
